idea-plugin.name: Embabel Agent
idea-plugin.description:
Provides IntelliJ IDEA support for the embabel-agent framework.
  • Suppresses false "unused method" warnings on framework-invoked annotations such as @Action, @Condition, and @Cost.
  • Highlights an error when an @AchievesGoal method in an @Agent class returns void instead of a goal result type.

localInspection.displayName: @AchievesGoal method returns void, must return a goal result type
